title: Shoengen Delta
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Shoengen Delta''' was the mouth of the [[Nihun River]], which connected it to the [[Nomers Ocean]], located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Brosi]]. The [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Shoengen]] was located on the delta itself. The delta was within the sphere of influence of the [[Brosin Underground]] around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
